shelfmark: PUL Islamic Manuscripts, Third Series no. 584e.9 (Michaelides 9)
description:
Recto: Legal document in Arabic. Dated: 20 Muḥarram 808 AH = 18 July 1405 CE. Involves Sayf al-Dīn Beğ b. ʿAbdallāh al-Tājir, a woman named Fāṭima, and an itemized list of the inheritance left to her by her husband. Also another woman whose name appears in the first line after the basmala (كرل؟ - the word before al-marʾa). Verso: Not photographed? (Previously catalogued as another Arabic legal record of testimony.) Needs examination.

NB: Michaelides 9 probably corresponds to image #40 at https://catalog.princeton.edu/catalog/9945255593506421.
description_he: רקטו: מסמך משפטי בערבית. תאריך: 20 מוחרם 808 להגירה = 18 ביולי 1405 לספירה. עוסק בסיף אל-דין בג' בן עבד אללה אל-תאג'ר, אישה בשם פאטמה, ורשימה מפורטת של הירושה שהותיר לה בעלה.
